containerVersion.name: Retaint Ecommerce Starter v1.0.0
containerVersion.description: Drop-in Retaint integration for GA4-style ecommerce dataLayer. Sets up Initialize on All Pages plus event tags for view_item, view_item_list, search, add_to_cart, begin_checkout, purchase, and retaint_identify. After import: set the 'Retaint - Org ID' Constant variable, then publish. Docs: https://retaint.com/integrations/gtm

variable.name: Retaint - Org ID
variable.notes: REQUIRED. Paste your Retaint Org ID here after importing the container. Find it in your Retaint dashboard under Settings → Workspace.

variable.name: CJS - Retaint Product Reference
variable.notes: Fallback chain for productview/addtocart eventVal: item_url -> item_id -> Page URL.

parameter.value: function(){var u={{DLV - ecommerce.items.0.item_url}};if(u)return u;var i={{DLV - ecommerce.items.0.item_id}};if(i)return i;return {{Page URL}};}

variable.name: CJS - Retaint Product IDs
variable.notes: Flattens ecommerce.items[] into an array of item_id strings for the 'buy' event.

parameter.value: function(){var items={{DLV - ecommerce.items}}||[];var out=[];for(var i=0;i<items.length;i++){var id=items[i]&&(items[i].item_id||items[i].id);if(id)out.push(String(id));}return out;}

variable.name: CJS - Retaint Checkout Payload
variable.notes: Builds the checkoutstarted payload from GA4 ecommerce dataLayer: {pageUrl, totalOrderValue, itemCount, items:[{productId,quantity}]}.

parameter.value: function(){var items={{DLV - ecommerce.items}}||[];var mapped=[];var total=0;for(var i=0;i<items.length;i++){var it=items[i]||{};var pid=it.item_id||it.id||'';var qty=it.quantity||1;if(pid)mapped.push({productId:String(pid),quantity:Number(qty)});total+=Number(qty);}return {pageUrl:{{Page URL}},totalOrderValue:String({{DLV - ecommerce.value}}||''),itemCount:total,items:mapped};}

variable.name: CJS - Retaint Order Payload
variable.notes: Builds the 'order' event payload from GA4 purchase dataLayer.

tag.name: Retaint — Checkout Started
tag.notes: Sends a string-form payload (JSON-stringified) because the Track Event 'object' mode is for flat key/value pairs only. The receiving end parses the JSON.

tag.name: Retaint — Buy
tag.notes: Sends the flattened product-ID array from ecommerce.items[]. Track Event 'array' mode expects SIMPLE_TABLE rows, so this tag uses string mode with the CJS-built array stringified.

customTemplate.name: Retaint
